Luigi Cherubini

The context indicates that Luigi Cherubini was active in composition throughout the 18th and 19th centuries. He composed several major works, including "Médée," "Ali Baba," and "A Child of Our Time." The context also mentions that he lived until 1842 and that his last opera, "Ali Baba," was premiered in 1833. 

Michael Tippett, on the other hand, was a composer who worked during the 20th century, composing "A Child of Our Time" between 1939 and 1941. He died in 1998.

Therefore, Luigi Cherubini was the composer who wrote his music most recently based on the information provided.
